---
title: "Permission Administration"
description: "Manage application and talent access stored in Cloudflare D1."
format:
  html:
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <meta name="robots" content="noindex, nofollow, noarchive">
    include-after-body:
      text: |
        <script src="assets/js/access-identity.js"></script>
        <script src="assets/js/admin-permissions.js"></script>
---

```{=html}
<div class="admin-shell" data-admin-root>
<section class="admin-intro">
<h2>D1 permission manager</h2>
<aside class="admin-boundary-note">
  <strong>Cloudflare Access is a separate login gate.</strong> If its policy uses an email allowlist, add the client there too. This page controls D1 product and talent permissions after login.
</aside>

<p>Add clients, assign products and talents, and deactivate access without putting client data in GitHub. All changes are written directly to Cloudflare D1.</p>

<div class="access-account" hidden>
  <span>Signed in as <strong data-access-email></strong></span>
  <span><a href="index.html">Back to applications</a> · <a href="/cdn-cgi/access/logout">Sign out</a></span>
</div>

<div class="admin-notice" data-admin-status role="status" aria-live="polite">
  Verifying administrator access and loading D1 permissions...
</div>

</section>

<div class="admin-layout" data-admin-content hidden>
  <aside class="admin-sidebar" aria-label="Permission records">
    <section class="admin-panel">
      <h3>Add a client</h3>
      <form data-add-user-form>
        <label for="new-user-email">Client email</label>
        <input id="new-user-email" name="email" type="email" autocomplete="off" required>
        <button type="submit">Add client</button>
      </form>
    </section>

    <section class="admin-panel admin-user-panel">
      <h3>Clients</h3>
      <label class="visually-hidden" for="user-search">Search clients</label>
      <input id="user-search" type="search" placeholder="Search by email" data-user-search>
      <div class="admin-user-list" data-user-list></div>
    </section>
  </aside>

  <main class="admin-workspace">
    <section class="admin-panel admin-empty-selection" data-empty-selection>
      <h3>Select a client</h3>
      <p>Choose a client on the left to review or change their D1 permissions.</p>
    </section>

    <form class="admin-panel admin-user-editor" data-user-editor hidden>
      <div class="admin-panel-heading">
        <div>
          <span class="admin-eyebrow">Client permissions</span>
          <h3 data-editor-title></h3>
        </div>
        <button type="submit" class="admin-primary-action">Save changes</button>
      </div>

      <div class="admin-user-fields">
        <label>Email <input name="email" type="email" required></label>
        <label class="admin-check"><input name="active" type="checkbox"> Account is active</label>
      </div>

      <div class="admin-section-heading">
        <h4>Manual product access</h4>
        <p>These assignments are controlled by this page.</p>
      </div>
      <div data-product-editor></div>

      <div class="admin-section-heading">
        <h4>Managed grants</h4>
        <p>Source-owned grants are shown for context and are not overwritten here.</p>
      </div>
      <div data-managed-grants></div>
    </form>

    <section class="admin-panel">
      <div class="admin-panel-heading">
        <div>
          <span class="admin-eyebrow">Permission catalog</span>
          <h3>Talents</h3>
        </div>
        <form class="admin-add-talent" data-add-talent-form>
          <label class="visually-hidden" for="new-talent-name">New talent name</label>
          <input id="new-talent-name" name="displayName" placeholder="New talent name" required>
          <button type="submit">Add talent</button>
        </form>
      </div>
      <div class="admin-talent-list" data-talent-list></div>
    </section>

    <section class="admin-panel">
      <span class="admin-eyebrow">Accountability</span>
      <h3>Recent changes</h3>
      <div class="admin-audit-list" data-audit-list></div>
    </section>
  </main>
</div>

</div>
```
